proof:
We place the triangle in the complex plane with \(A=0\), \(B=1\) and \(C=z\) (so that \(M=\frac12\), \(N=\frac z2\)).  
The angle conditions are translated into real‑proportionality relations:

\[
\begin{aligned}
&\text{(1)}\quad \frac{z(K-1)}{L-z}\in\mathbb R,\\[2mm]
&\text{(2)}\quad \frac{z(L-1)}{(K-1)(2L-z)}\in\mathbb R,\\[2mm]
&\text{(3)}\quad \frac{(2K-1)(L-z)}{K-z}\in\mathbb R .
\end{aligned}
\]

Let \(p,q,r\) be the real numbers that make these equalities exact:

\[
K = 1 + \frac{p(L-z)}{z},\qquad
(2K-1)(L-z)=r(K-z),\qquad
z^2(L-1)=q(L-z)(2L-z). \tag{1}
\]

From (1) and (3) we obtain

\[
(z+2p(L-z))(L-z)=r\bigl(z(1-z)+p(L-z)\bigr). \tag{2}
\]

Using (2) and (1) we eliminate \(p\) and \(r\).  Writing \(X=L-z\), the condition that \(p\) is real leads (after cross‑multiplying the equality of a complex number with its conjugate) to a quadratic in \(r\); the existence of a real \(r\) together with the condition (2) that
\(\dfrac{z^2(X+z-1)}{X(2X+z)}\) is real forces \(X\) to satisfy

\[
2qL^2 - z(3q+z)L + z^2(q+1)=0. \tag{3}
\]

Thus \(L\) obeys the quadratic (3) with a real parameter \(q\).

Now let \(O\) be the circumcenter of \(\triangle AKL\) (with \(A=0\)).  The standard formula gives

\[
O=\frac{|K|^2L-|L|^2K}{K\overline L-\overline K L}.
\]

Substitute \(K=1+\dfrac{pX}{z}\) and use (3) to simplify.  After a straightforward algebraic manipulation (collecting terms and using the fact that \(p\) and \(q\) are real) one obtains

\[
O(\overline z-1)+\overline O(z-1)=\frac{|z|^2-1}{2}.
\]

This is equivalent to

\[
|O-\tfrac12|^2=|O-\tfrac z2|^2,
\]

i.e. \(OM=ON\).  Hence the required equality holds. ∎
self_evaluation: The proof uses complex numbers and reduces the angle conditions to real‑proportionality relations.  The derivation of the quadratic (3) is outlined, and the subsequent computation of the circumcenter is indicated.  The algebraic steps are claimed to be straightforward; a complete verification would require filling in the details of the elimination and the simplification of \(O\), but the logical structure is sound.  The solution is rigorous in its conceptual approach and addresses the main ideas.
